title: Net Music
description: A CD player that can directly play NetEase Cloud network streaming music
body:
# Introduce
This mod adds a CD player that can directly play network-streamed music. Its behavior is exactly the same as the vanilla CD player. Other players near the CD player can also hear the music you play!

The songs played on the CD can be customized through NBT data, and support for NetEase Cloud Music has been specially added!

![music](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a57b4010950e9c73f8ab8ebf38e6d0db06896cf.webp)
![cd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71e686d485badcd3f9a4aec9d6efee400211ef50.webp)

# How to Play Custom Music on Server
## Plan A:  Google Drive

1. Make sure NetMusic mod is installed on both server and client side.
2. Upload your song to Google Drive (Only MP3 format is supported).

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09c45e3d115cbc0ccb141499275883fbdf943655.png)  
3. Double click on the file, and select the 3 dot icon on the top right. Click "Open in a new window" option.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b024e55487feb3a8749ce7c967ec36d76ae825.webp)  
4. In the new window, copy the link in the URL box.

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0999a4a19f918c479586adee4e005c64deeb0918.webp)  
5. Open the in-game GUI, and fill in the details below:"
  - Enter the song url: Paste the link here
  - Enter the song name: Input the song name
  - Time (s): the duration of the song in seconds
 
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf5b6bb2bb312b05947d0c1bcd943baa8152579a.png)  
6. In the event where the song cannot be played, you will need to convert your link using the template below:
```
https://drive.usercontent.google.com/download?id={your ID}&export=download&authuser=0
```
delete {your ID} and paste Gdrive id example link
```
1tCHwUOBJJ0UjJjM3QyyCT7t-JAwqJhwN
```
![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1d97c124fae1e5689db454c473b1efa177f0fc1.png)


## Plan B: YouTube
1. find you music youtube url link, I gave you some example : `https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UqP8rZu6xLM`

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169b2dbf64cd2c2dba9983f621c6bae9602c62c6.png)  
2. now paste your link at yt2mp3 converter: [https://mp3-convert.org/youtube-to-mp3-converterss/](https://mp3-convert.org/youtube-to-mp3-converterss/)

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb717d6ab5de4475afeda92658abc3a4bf70b087.png)  
3. convert and you got 2 section download and convert next.

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eb43168a2224727cbca4ceccf0e0e48ff0629f3.png)  
4. Right klik download section and copy link address

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aed3a6a34eab7a630bc423981235ab2d72d99e45.png)  
5. input at song url in game, dont forget to input song time

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55558095b9daefcf31e91eb792fed3990b5d1ed8.png)

**Thanks to Kucing, luckyu19 for the help**
